name: restaurant managers at small to medium-sized restaurants processing 10-30 shifts per week tool
description: For restaurant managers at small to medium-sized restaurants processing 10-30 shifts per week, inefficient manual scheduling causes staff dissatisfaction. We automate scheduling instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets or paper.
target_audience: restaurant managers at small to medium-sized restaurants processing 10-30 shifts per week
problem_solved: inefficient manual scheduling and shift swapping
